# selà

> selà is a software developer and conceptual artist. The site presents a small, curated set of works alongside brief About and Contact panels.

The site is a single-page experience (Next.js App Router) with four views — Hero, Works, About, Contact — switched from a top navbar. The Works view embeds each piece in an iframe and supports keyboard/touch navigation between them.

## Works

- [Conceptual Timing](https://xn--sel-cla.com/meditativeclocks/exhibition/conceptual-timing/index.html): An exhibition piece from the Meditative Clocks series exploring time as concept rather than measurement.
- [pxsoul](https://pxsoul.xn--sel-cla.com/): A standalone work hosted on its own subdomain.

## Site

- [Home](https://xn--sel-cla.com/): Entry point with navigation to all views.
- [Sitemap](https://xn--sel-cla.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of URLs.

## Optional

- [ASCII profile](https://xn--sel-cla.com/ascii-profile.txt)
